      public int getMaxMathSymbolSize()
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolRegistry
      Returns the maximal size of the key that maps to mathematical symbols.
      Specified by:
      getMaxMathSymbolSize in interface ISymbolRegistry
      Returns:
      the longest key that maps to mathematical symbols

    • getMathSymbols

      public Collection<ISymbol> getMathSymbols(int i)
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolRegistry
      Returns the association of keys and the corresponding collection of mathematical symbols.
      Specified by:
      getMathSymbols in interface ISymbolRegistry
      Parameters:
      i - the character length of the symbol key to get symbols for
      Returns:
      a map associating keys and the collection of symbols which correspond to it
